svg.text:
Same knowledge today = same knowledge
tomorrow. Zero growth between sessions.

Every task gets the same persona.
No specialization. No cognitive diversity.

No way to tell if the system is getting
better. No dashboard. No convergence target.

One failure crashes everything. Shell
injection in MCP. Race conditions in state.
Task → Enneagram Core (9 nodes) → Pipeline divergent/convergent → Record to SAFLA
Daemon picks weakest node → generates task → runs full cycle → measures convergence delta
Extracts patterns → techniques → attitudes → principles. Reverse mirror → separate channel.
127.0.0.1:18777 · Single process · Zero race conditions · SAFLA single writer

Deploy an agent that gets better
every day without manual retuning.

Route a problem through 9 cognitive
personas → get 9 perspectives →
converge into one verdict.

Pre-commit checks · pre-push gate
code review · risk assessment
all routed through best node.

Memory pyramid auto-consolidates
everything learned. N1 → N6
principles extracted automatically.

g.text: 111 iterations · 187 episodes · 9 nodes tracked · Trend: converging
